notes:
I've designed the AETHER landing page with an Apple-inspired aesthetic. It features a sleek, floating hardware render on a black-to-silver hero stage, a massive headline, and a minimalist navigation bar. I also included a section showing its integration across your ecosystem—phone, Mac, and audio devices—maintaining a sparse, premium feel throughout.

The new design system and the landing page are now on your canvas.
prompt: Design an Apple-inspired landing page for a desk AI device. Use a black-to-silver hero stage, floating hardware render, a huge restrained headline, minimal navigation, and one section showing ecosystem pairing across phone, desktop, and audio. Keep the layout sparse, glossy, and expensive.
suggestions: Add a 'Tech Specs' section with detailed hardware info
Create a mobile version of the landing page
Design a checkout page for pre-ordering the device
title: AETHER Landing Page
